device.usbDescription: Silicon Labs CP210x USB to UART Bridge

rePairing.core2RuntimeConfirmation: firmware-uploaded; alpha4 local bridge restart requires closing the admin-owned 8080 process first

codexRelay.command: cmd.exe /d /s /c npm run codex:answer -- --summary "Codex返答表示" --text "..."
codexRelay.evidence: User confirmed the Core2 displayed the Codex relay answer as intended after running npm run codex:answer.

japaneseDisplay.codexAnswerCommand: cmd.exe /d /s /c npm run codex:answer -- --summary "日本語表示" --text "これは日本語の表示確認です。Core2のAnswer画面で文字化けせずに表示されれば合格です。"
japaneseDisplay.evidence: Firmware source and build now use a Japanese-capable font and UTF-8 codepoint paging. A Japanese answer.completed event was queued and polled by Core2. User visual confirmation is still required for glyph rendering on the physical screen.

serialEvidence.logRetention: redacted local logs were used during verification and are not release assets

core2ButtonA.evidence: Host Bridge /events inbound contained device.reply_selected after user pressed A on the M5Stack Choice screen

remainingRisks: Core2 touch and swipe physical interaction not exercised
GRAY target not uploaded to physical hardware
GRAY IMU tap fallback not exercised
real Codex App internal API is not used; relay uses clipboard/stdin/file input
Core2 Japanese glyph rendering requires user visual confirmation after upload
local 8080 bridge is still an admin-owned v0.1.0-alpha.2 process; close it and start v0.1.0-alpha.4 before final manual confirmation
